title: Lush Life
why_this_song: Lush Life by Zara Larsson (2015) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 12 times; first heard in: "Doin' it all night, all summer"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "I live my day as if it was the last"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Doin' it all night, all summer"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Doin' it all night, all summer"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "It was a crush"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Doin' it all night, all summer
Doin' it the way I wanna
Yeah, I'ma dance my heart out 'til the dawn
But I won't be done when mornin' comes
The lush life's given me a rush
Had one chance to make me blush
Second time is one too late

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "doin'" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "doin'" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "live" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Doin' it all night, all summer
I kept sayin' I'ma stay in touch
Had one chance to make me blush

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Lush Life" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Lush Life" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
